content:
🎯 Focus:
• Understanding the writing process as iterative (prewriting → drafting → revising).
• Defining personal voice & purpose in writing.
• Exploring the connection between reading comprehension and writing clarity.

Day 2 | Audience, Purpose, and Expression | Tuesday

📌 Main Tasks:
• 💬 Discussion: Week 1 | What Does Writing Mean to You? (In-Class Activity)
• Understanding tone, purpose, and audience in writing.

📚 Readings & Presentations:
• 📂 Canvas Presentation: Week 1 | The Importance of Using Proper Grammar, Punctuation, and Spelling
• 📂 Canvas Presentation: Week 1 | Common Mistakes Made with Grammar, Punctuation, and Spelling
• 📖 Textbook Reading: Chapter 2 Section 1: Purpose, Audience, Tone, and Content
• 📖 Textbook Reading: Chapter 2 Section 2: Effective Means for Writing a Paragraph

🎯 Focus:
• Identifying audience needs & adapting writing for clarity & impact.
• Exploring formal vs. informal writing styles.
